title: marianthemum alpinum
intro: Marianthemum alpinum, also known as the Alpine Spirea or False Heather, is a flowering plant species within the family Rubus. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots are used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Marianthemum alpinum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
